name: @theaigentscompany/mcp
description: TheAIgentsCompany-MCP — projects, messages, guestbook, and Agent Feed through your AI agent

scripts.build:dxt: esbuild src/bin.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outfile=server/index.js --format=cjs --banner:js="const require = (await import('node:module')).createRequire(import.meta.url);" && zip -r theaigentscompany.dxt manifest.json icon.png server/
scripts.build:mcpb: npm run build:dxt && cp theaigentscompany.dxt theaigentscompany.mcpb

author: TheAIgentsCompany
